testcase.name: requireAuth > no auth headers > returns 401 'No token' when both Authorization and x-session-token are absent
requireAuth > session-token path > returns 401 'Invalid session' when verifySession returns null
requireAuth > session-token path > returns 401 'User not found' when session is valid but user not in DB
requireAuth > session-token path > sets req.user, calls next() and extends session on valid session token
requireAuth > session-token path > returns 401 when session verification throws
requireAuth > Bearer token path > returns 401 'Invalid token format' when Authorization header has no token after 'Bearer '
requireAuth > Bearer token path > calls next() and sets req.user for a valid Bearer JWT without sid
requireAuth > Bearer token path > returns 401 'Token expired' for an expired JWT
requireAuth > Bearer token path > returns 401 'Invalid token' for a malformed JWT
requireAuth > Bearer token path > returns 401 'Session revoked' when JWT has sid but session is no longer active
requireAuth > Bearer token path > calls next() when JWT has sid and session is still active
optionalAuth > calls next() without setting req.user when no auth headers are present
optionalAuth > sets req.user and calls next() for a valid session token
optionalAuth > sets req.user and calls next() for a valid Bearer JWT
optionalAuth > returns 401 'Token expired' for expired JWT in optionalAuth
requireRole middleware > calls next() when the user has an allowed role
requireRole middleware > returns 403 when the user's role is not in the allowed list
requireRole middleware > returns 401 when req.user is undefined
requireRole middleware > allows any role listed in the allowed array
requireRole middleware > rejects a role not in a multi-role allowed list
requireRole middleware > rejects when allowedRoles is empty
validate middleware > calls next() and replaces req.body with sanitized value on valid input
validate middleware > returns 400 with errors array on invalid input
validate middleware > collects all validation errors (abortEarly: false)
validate middleware > strips unknown fields from req.body (stripUnknown: true)
validate middleware > coerces string numbers to numbers (convert: true)
validate middleware > handles undefined req.body gracefully (defaults to {})
validate middleware > error details include field path and message
